assertions: officialModpacks contains Ashfall and Sky Relay launcher products surfaced for public alpha readiness
Sky Relay remains preview-gated until release evidence is promoted
ModpacksPage server-render smoke includes all three Sky Relay cards and no Sky Relay install/play affordance

layoutFixesVerified: Pack cards use full launcher row until 2xl before adding the import column.
Official pack card heading uses card-scale type and no inline overflow at the default browser-preview viewport.

residualRisks: The browser-preview smoke verifies the React launcher surface in Vite; it does not replace a packaged Electron install/update click-through.

Version-transition update mechanics are covered by release-readiness/sky-relay-launcher-lifecycle-smoke.json using a fixture-local previous Sky Relay manifest; this report does not claim a second public Sky Relay release exists.

A phone-width viewport still exposes a wider desktop launcher shell; this is outside the Sky Relay card fix and should be handled as a separate responsive shell task if mobile launcher support is required.
